summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Orbit CRM frontend application. All 26 major features tested successfully including Dashboard, My Network, Contact Detail, Add Contact, Profile, Activity, and Linked Apps pages. All AI features working with MOCKED responses as expected.
passed_tests: Dashboard loads with 'Good morning, Arkin' greeting and current date
Dashboard shows 3 metric cards (Due today: 3, This week: 0, Overdue: 3)
Dashboard TODAY section shows 3 outreach cards with avatars, warmth pills, channel pills
Dashboard mark done and dismiss buttons work correctly
Dashboard overdue section expands/collapses properly
Dashboard FAB button navigates to /add-contact successfully
Sidebar navigation works - toggle collapse/expand functionality
My Network page displays all contacts in card grid view
My Network search functionality works (tested with 'Sarah')
My Network filter pills work (tested consulting filter)
My Network card/list view toggle works correctly
Contact card navigation to /contact/:id works
Contact Detail shows complete header (avatar, name, role, company, tags, LinkedIn link)
Contact Detail shows AI Relationship Summary (mocked content)
Contact Detail shows AI Recommendation with channel, tone, timing pills and draft message
Contact Detail shows Google Calendar and Apple Reminders buttons
Contact Detail shows interaction timeline with 3 interactions
Contact Detail Add Interaction modal works - opens, fills form, submits successfully
Contact Detail Edit functionality works - inline editing enabled and saves
Add Contact page has all 3 tabs: URL, Paste Text, Manual Entry
Add Contact URL tab: AI extraction works with mocked LinkedIn data
Add Contact Paste tab: AI text extraction works with mocked data
Add Contact Manual tab: form fills and creates new contact successfully
Profile page shows Arkin Sanghi, CMU Tepper, LinkedIn URL correctly
Profile page shows network stats in 4-stat row
Profile settings modals work: notification preferences and warmth engine settings
Profile export data functionality works (CSV download triggered)
Activity page shows chronological activity log grouped by date (7 groups, 12 items)
Linked Apps page shows all 4 integration cards
Notification bell shows count (2) and navigates to /activity correctly
success_percentage: Frontend: 100% - All 26 major features working correctly
